name: Tool Card: Write
summary: Displays file write operations with created/overwritten file details
goals: Render file write results showing the created or overwritten file
Indicate whether a file was created new or overwritten

specDetail.description: A specialized tool card for file write operations. Displays the file path, whether the file was created or overwritten, file size, and a preview of the written content.

parameters.name: filePath
parameters.description: Path of the file that was written

parameters.name: content
parameters.description: Content that was written to the file

parameters.name: isOverwrite
parameters.description: Whether the file existed and was overwritten

parameters.name: fileSize
parameters.description: Size of the written content in bytes

constraints: Must visually distinguish between new file creation and file overwrite
Must show content preview with syntax highlighting based on file extension
Must truncate preview for files exceeding 50 lines with an expand option

acceptanceCriteria.given: a file write operation result is received
acceptanceCriteria.then: the file path, creation/overwrite status, and content preview are displayed

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: docs(sync-specs): implement leaf determination redesign with frontend/backend criteria
